name: HelloFresh
collaborationStyle: meal unboxing, recipe integration, discount code
notes: One of the most prolific YouTube sponsors ever; wide creator range accepted; very fast deal turnaround

name: DoorDash
collaborationStyle: lifestyle integration, food challenge, convenience story
notes: Broad appeal beyond food niche; often sponsors entertainment and lifestyle creators too

name: Whole Foods
collaborationStyle: grocery haul, healthy meal prep, ingredient showcase
notes: Strong fit for healthy eating, meal prep, and clean eating creators; Amazon-owned so deals can be bundled

name: KitchenAid
collaborationStyle: baking showcase, equipment review, recipe integration
notes: Iconic kitchen brand; extremely strong fit for baking and home cooking creators; high product recognition drives conversion

name: Made In Cookware
collaborationStyle: recipe showcase, product review, kitchen tour
notes: Rapidly growing DTC cookware brand with active creator program; strong fit for serious home cooks

name: Thrive Market
collaborationStyle: pantry haul, healthy eating story, membership walkthrough
notes: Online organic grocery membership; great for healthy eating, clean eating, and budget wellness creators

name: Factor Meals
collaborationStyle: meal unboxing, busy lifestyle story, macro-tracking integration
notes: Prepared meal delivery targeting fitness and busy professional audiences; high crossover with fitness creators

name: Hexclad
collaborationStyle: cooking demo, kitchen upgrade story, chef-style recipe
notes: Gordon Ramsay-backed cookware brand; strong conversion for cooking creators with an aspirational kitchen aesthetic

name: Diaspora Co.
collaborationStyle: spice showcase, recipe integration, sourcing story
notes: Single-origin spice company with strong values story; ideal for creators focused on global cuisine or ethical sourcing

name: Chomps
collaborationStyle: snack review, on-the-go lifestyle, high-protein story
notes: Grass-fed meat stick brand; great crossover between food and fitness creators; easy casual integration

name: Brightland
collaborationStyle: ingredient spotlight, cooking integration, aesthetic unboxing
notes: Premium olive oil and vinegar brand; ideal for food creators with an aesthetic or slow-living angle

name: Fly By Jing
collaborationStyle: sauce integration, recipe showcase, flavor story
notes: Cult chili crisp and sauce brand; strong fit for creators covering Asian cuisine, bold flavors, or chef-adjacent content

name: Graza
collaborationStyle: cooking integration, squeeze-bottle showcase, recipe content
notes: Viral squeeze-bottle olive oil brand; great for creators who make visually engaging cooking content

name: Wildgrain
collaborationStyle: sourdough/bread unboxing, home dining story, artisan food content
notes: Frozen artisan bread and pasta subscription; perfect for cottage-food, cozy cooking, or home dining creators

name: Omsom
collaborationStyle: Asian recipe integration, pantry staple showcase, cultural food story
notes: Asian-American sauce and starter brand; ideal for creators covering Asian cuisine or cultural food content

name: Banza
collaborationStyle: healthy swap story, pasta recipe, high-protein meal prep
notes: Chickpea pasta brand; strong crossover between food and fitness/nutrition creators; easy recipe integration
